---
name: Basic Issue 
about: Tell us more about the problem you've found.
title: "[Basic issue]"
labels: issue
assignees: ''
---

## What problem have you identified?

<!-- You opened the issue for some reason, right? -->

## Do you have a solution?

<!-- You don't have to have a solution, finding problems is good too. -->

## How important is this to you?

<!-- Will you still like us if we don't fix it? -->

## How important do you think this is to others?

<!-- Will other people still like us if we don't fix it? -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Seriously, anything. -->
